LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC AND UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC ARTHUR A. DUGONI SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO CONSTITUTE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION, FRAUD, BREACH OF CONTRACT, BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING, AND VIOLATIONS OF UNFAIR COMPETITION LAW. (CCP 430.10(E).) DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER ON THE GROUNDS OF UNCERTAINTY IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. OWEN J. RESCHER, TEL. NO. 722-8923 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC and UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC ARTHUR A. DUGONI SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Defendants' request for judicial notice is denied. Plaintiff has alleged sufficient facts to constitute causes of action for negligent misrepresentation, fraud, breach of contract, breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing, and violations of unfair competition law. (CCP 430.10(e).) Defendants' demurrer on the grounds of uncertainty is overruled. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Denied

DUGONI SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. Defendants' request for judicial notice is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H.
